title: comastoma pulmonarium subsp. pulmonarium
intro: Comastoma pulmonarium subsp. pulmonarium, also known as Lungwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote health and well-being.
